mapper.select: /** UsptEvlSectDao.selectList */ select sect_id , evl_plan_id , sect_nm , evl_trget_co , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_sect where 1 = 1 and evl_plan_id = #{evlPlanId}

/** UsptEvlSectDao.selectExistList */ select sect_id , evl_plan_id , sect_nm , evl_trget_co , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_sect where 1 = 1 and evl_plan_id = #{evlPlanId}
and sect_id = #{sectId}
